ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag; Kaya character identified via flavor text and documented as appears_on candidate for kaya.md node. Parent has already applied characters: [kaya] to frontmatter.

trivia_bullets.text: Green common Instant (MKM, no. 159, February 9, 2024). +3/+3 and trample until end of turn — standard green combat trick at common.

"What is this? An ambush or a staring contest?" Kaya taunted. As if in answer, the robed figure lunged forward. Kaya Cassir is a Planeswalker/ghost hunter recruited by Ezrim to lead the MKM murder investigation.
sources: magic.wizards.com: The Legends and Characters of MKM

trivia_bullets.text: Printing error: the MKM showcase version (collector no. 310) was printed with an in-progress unfinished artwork. Wizards issued an official correction notice; early showcase copies (310† on Scryfall) may carry a collector premium.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Incorrect Version Printed for Fanatical Strength in MKM

trivia_bullets.text: Two flavor texts exist in print: regular no. 159 has the Kaya line; showcase no. 310 has Alquist Proft case-notes text ('Clearly we are on the trail of the true killer.'). Showcase reprints in MKM sometimes use different flavor copy.
